name: digital-marketing-pro
description: End-to-end digital marketing engagement methodology for Claude Code & Cowork. **v3.4** adds: (1) C2PA content-provenance skill + script (embed-c2pa.py wrapping c2pa-python) for EU AI Act Article 50 compliance — embeds machine-readable provenance manifests in AI-generated images/video/audio/PDF before EU publication, verified via /digital-marketing-pro:check pre-publish gate; (2) unified ads-platform MCPs (Synter 14 platforms, Ryze Google+Meta+GA4, Northbeam self-hosted) in the connectors catalog as HTTP/Cowork-compatible alternatives to per-platform stdio servers; (3) explicit parallel subagent dispatch instructions in engagement-workflow (Parts 2, 4, 9, 10, 11 dispatch independent sub-tasks via multiple Task calls in one message) + 4 multi-dimensional commands (competitor-analysis 7 dimensions, seo-audit 6 dimensions, content-engine per-format, campaign-plan per-channel) — leverages Claude Code's April 2026 parallel-subagent initialization for ~6× wall-clock speedup; (4) Anthropic Software Directory submission packet at SUBMISSION.md. v3.3 modernized May 2026 reality across privacy/compliance, channel mechanics, and AEO/GEO. v3.0 introduced the 12-Part Strategy Flow producing the Four Core Documents (61 explicit steps), Two-Views Model, Decision Matrix, Update-Back Rule, Living Project Instruction File. 25 specialist agents, 150 skills, 71 Python scripts, 10 top-level commands, 14 HTTP MCP connectors, 16 industry profiles, 16 privacy-law jurisdictions.
